title: melandrium noctiflorum
intro: Melandrium noctiflorum, also known as Night-flowering Catchfly, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Caryophyllaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Melandrium noctiflorum are said to include relief from colds, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to soothe wounds and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Melandrium noctiflorum can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
